children.name: This is the payload, built in real time.

text.content: This is the payload, built in real time.

Every NQR code is an EMVCo TLV string — a chain of Tag · Length · Value triplets sealed with a CRC-16 checksum. In the live build this regenerates as you type; here is the engine's output for a static merchant code.

children.name: Static QR carries no amount — the payer types it at scan time.

text.content: Static QR carries no amount — the payer types it at scan time.
